# airflow_pool (Resource)

Provides an Airflow pool.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "airflow_pool" "example" {
  name  = "example"
  slots = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the pool.
- `slots` (Number) The number of slots in the pool.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the pool.
- `include_deferred` (Boolean) Whether to include deferred tasks when calculating open pool slots.

### Read-Only

- `deferred_slots` (Number) The number of slots with deferred tasks.
- `id` (String) The pool name.
- `occupied_slots` (Number) The number of slots used.
- `open_slots` (Number) The number of open slots in the pool.
- `queued_slots` (Number) The number of slots with queued tasks.
- `running_slots` (Number) The number of slots with running tasks.
- `scheduled_slots` (Number) The number of slots with scheduled tasks.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import airflow_pool.example example
```
